questionHtml: Using an externalities diagram, explain the benefits of hygiene and sanitation education programmes (paragraph [5]).
markschemeHtml:
Candidates who incorrectly label diagrams can be awarded a maximum of [3].

The vertical axis can be price, costs or benefits. The horizontal axis is quantity. A title is not necessary.

meta.title: Using an externalities diagram, explain the benefits of hygiene and sanitation education programmes (paragraph [5]).
